messages.text: Hi Abdi, just flagged something from Sunday at Kallan's — you didn't clock in for either of your shifts that day (the 15:00–21:00 and the 21:00–09:00). Can you let me know what happened? We need to get this sorted.

Thanks for getting back to me! Just a couple other things that popped up:

So on Wednesday and Thursday last week (17th & 18th), the system auto-closed your shifts at Kallan's at 15:10 both days. Just make sure you're clocking out manually before you leave — otherwise it can mess with the hours logged.

Also on Wednesday, the incident report you filed needs a bit more detail. Right now it just says "Behavioural" but NDIS needs enough info to actually understand what happened. And we're also missing who you notified after — whether that's the family, guardian, or whoever. Can you add those in?

One more thing — you've clocked 17.3 hours this period but were only rostered for 12. That extra 5.3 hours needs to be authorised before we can bill it, so just double-check with your manager on that.

Oh, and I see you've got three pending shift amendments in (Wed, Thu, Fri). They've come through fine — just sitting in the queue for approval. No action needed from you, just wanted you to know they're being looked at.

Got a couple of things from Kallan Jordan's shift on Thursday that need sorting:

You clocked in 217 mins late at Kallan's — was meant to be 15:00 but didn't get there til 18:37. What happened there?

Also, the system auto-closed your shift at 21:10 since you didn't clock out manually. Just make sure you're clocking out yourself when you finish, yeah?

One more thing — you sent in a shift amendment for that day and we've got it. Just letting you know it's in the system and pending review on our end. Nothing you need to do, we'll sort it and get back to you.

Also just noticed you clocked out early on Friday at Nada Haliem's — left at 14:09 when you were scheduled until 16:00. Can you let me know what happened there?

And one more thing — you submitted a shift amendment for that same Friday that's pending review. Just wanted to let you know we've got it and it's being looked at, so no need to do anything else on your end.

Thanks for getting back to me. Just a couple more things that came up:

**Friday 19-Jun:** You left at 15:10 but were rostered until 21:00 — that's a pretty big gap. And the system auto-closed your shift instead of you clocking out manually. Can you make sure you're clocking out at the end of your shifts going forward?

**Thursday 18-Jun:** You clocked in 95 mins late (10:34 instead of 09:00). Just flagging it so we've got it on record.

On the incident reports from Wednesday — we've got Entry #340 flagged because some of the language is a bit subjective (like "erupted in anger", "beyond reason") when NDIS needs factual descriptions of what actually happened. Also need to clarify if "he said he wanted to harm us" is a direct quote or your interpretation. And for both incidents we need to know who was notified after — whether that's family, guardians, or whoever. Can you update those?

You've also got a few shift amendments pending review, so just let you know we've got your notes and they're being looked at.
Just one more thing — you've also got a shift amendment pending for Evan Gatt on Saturday the 20th. Your notes are in and being reviewed, so nothing else you need to do on that one either.

Hey, couple more things to sort out actually.

You didn't clock in at all for Kallan's on Wednesday (15:00–21:00 shift) — need you to make sure you're clocking in for every shift you work.

Same with Joshua's on Thursday morning (09:00–14:00) — that one never got clocked in either.

Also, there's an incident report you filed for Kallan's on Wednesday that needs more detail. Right now it just says "Training cancelled" but we need enough info to actually understand what happened — NDIS needs that.

And on that same report, we need to know who was notified about it (like a guardian or family member). Can you add that in when you get a chance?

Hi Abdul,

Got a few things to sort out from your recent shifts at Evan Gatt's place.

So on Thursday and Friday (18th & 19th), you filed incident reports but the descriptions were super brief — just "evan gatt" each time. NDIS needs way more detail so they can actually understand what happened. Can you add some proper notes to those?

Also missing from both reports — who was there when it happened and who you told about it (like family/guardians). That's required too.

On a lighter note, you've got three shift amendments pending review from Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday. Just wanted to let you know we got them and they're being looked at — nothing else you need to do on your end.

Can you get those incident report details filled in though? Those need to be done within 30 mins of the shift ending so we can get them sorted properly.

Hi Hajar,

Quick heads up on a couple of shift amendments. Nicole Loveless submitted one for Wednesday 17-Jun and Mathew B Worden submitted one for Friday 19-Jun — both are just waiting on our end for review. Their notes came through fine, so nothing for them to do now, just wanted to let you know they're in the queue.

Hi Ikram,

Just flagging something from your roster — Xavier Putchakayla on Thursday 18th June (17:00–21:00 shift) never clocked in. Can you let me know what happened there?

Hi Ahmed,

Just flagging a couple of things from your shift at Joshua Gatt's on Saturday:

The system auto clock-out kicked in at 14:10 since you didn't manually clock out — just so you know for next time, make sure to do that before you leave.

Also got your shift amendment request and we've got your notes. They're pending review on our end, so nothing you need to do — we'll sort it and let you know.
